elements.title: lang::report_page_045_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT kbi_c.id,
       kbi_c.fullname,
       COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_ra.userid)                                        as all_learners,
       COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
                        WHEN comp.userid IS NOT NULL AND kbi_ula.id IS NOT NULL THEN kbi_u.id
                        ELSE NULL END)                                  as completed_learners,
       COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
                        WHEN comp.userid IS NULL AND kbi_ula.id IS NOT NULL THEN kbi_u.id
                        ELSE NULL END)                                  as not_completed_learners,
       COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN kbi_ula.id IS NULL THEN kbi_u.id ELSE NULL END) as not_accessed_learners
FROM mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra
       JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx ON kbi_ctx.id = kbi_ra.contextid AND kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50
       JOIN mdl_course kbi_c ON kbi_c.id = kbi_ctx.instanceid
       JOIN mdl_user kbi_u ON kbi_u.id = kbi_ra.userid
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_cm.course, kbi_cmc.userid
                  FROM mdl_course_modules kbi_cm
                         JOIN mdl_course_modules_completion kbi_cmc
                           ON kbi_cmc.coursemoduleid = kbi_cm.id AND kbi_cmc.completionstate = 1
                  WHERE kbi_cmc.id > 0
                  GROUP BY kbi_cm.course, kbi_cmc.userid) comp ON comp.userid = kbi_u.id AND comp.course = kbi_c.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_user_lastaccess kbi_ula ON kbi_ula.courseid = kbi_c.id AND kbi_ula.userid = kbi_ra.userid
WHERE kbi_c.id > 0
  AND kbi_u.deleted = 0
  AND kbi_u.suspended = 0
  AND kbi_u.username != 'guest'
  AND kbi_c.visible = 1
  AND kbi_ra.roleid = 5
GROUP BY kbi_c.id
